zh.Congham, Kings Lynn and West Norfolk Bor: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可從哈姆
zh.West Bilney, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可韋斯特 比爾尼
zh.All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Englan: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可金也斯 琳哥吉拉 沙智
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Norreys於1434年出生在英國諾福爾可韋斯特 比爾尼時，他的父親Lord Geoffrey le Norreys26歲，母親Margery Might22歲。他於1454年與Lady Margery Merbrooke在英國英格蘭諾福爾可金也斯 琳哥吉拉 沙智結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1504年9月1日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可。

zh-hans.Congham, Kings Lynn and West Norfolk Bor: 英国英格兰諾福爾可從哈姆
zh-hans.West Bilney, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可韋斯特 比爾尼
zh-hans.All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Englan: 英国英格兰諾福爾可金也斯 琳哥吉拉 沙智
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Norreys于1434年出生在英国諾福爾可韋斯特 比爾尼时，他的父亲Lord Geoffrey le Norreys26岁，母亲Margery Might22岁。他于1454年与Lady Margery Merbrooke在英国英格兰諾福爾可金也斯 琳哥吉拉 沙智结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1504年9月1日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Norreys was born in 1434, in West Bilney, Norfolk, England, his father, Lord Geoffrey le Norreys, was 26 and his mother, Margery Might, was 22. He married Lady Margery Merbrooke in 1454, in All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 1 September 1504, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Englan: All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Norreys est né en 1434, à West Bilney, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Lord Geoffrey le Norreys, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margery Might, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margery Merbrooke en 1454, à All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1504, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Englan: All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Norreys 1434 in West Bilney, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Geoffrey le Norreys 26 und seine Mutter Margery Might 22. Er hat 1454 in All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Lady Margery Merbrooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 1. September 1504 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Englan: All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Norreys è nato il nel 1434 nel West Bilney, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Lord Geoffrey le Norreys, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margery Might, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margery Merbrooke nel 1454, nel All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 settembre 1504, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Congham, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクコンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Norreysが1434年にイギリスノーフォルクウエスト ビルニーで生まれた時，父Lord Geoffrey le Norreysは26歳，母Margery Mightは22歳であった。1454年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンアル サインツでLady Margery Merbrookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1504年9月1日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그'스 린 앨 세인츠
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Norreys(이)가 1434년 영국 노르폴크 웨스트 비네이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Geoffrey le Norreys(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Might(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그'스 린 앨 세인츠에서 Lady Margery Merbrooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1504년 9월 1일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Englan: All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Norreys nasceu em 1434, em West Bilney, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Geoffrey le Norreys, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margery Might, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margery Merbrooke em 1454, em All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1504, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Englan: алл сеинц, кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Norreys родился в 1434 г. в местности вест билни, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Geoffrey le Norreys было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Might, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margery Merbrooke в 1454 г. в местности алл сеинц, кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 1 сентября 1504 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Norreys nació en 1434, en West Bilney, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Geoffrey le Norreys, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margery Might, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Margery Merbrooke en 1454, en All Saints, King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1504, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
